purpose: Rewire the returning-user branch of GroupsPage() so a returning user (isFreshIdentity === false) opening a group invite link lands on the normal groups list (with a new Invited/Awaiting info banner above it) instead of the full-screen JoinRequestCard replacement, while a genuine first-time visitor's existing full-screen delegation (DD-5) is left byte-identical. Folds the 'Awaiting banner' presentational row from architecture.md's module map into this module (per stories.json's note) since it is inline landing-page chrome with no owned data of its own.

public_api.name: resolveInviteBannerState
public_api.signature: (params: { hasJoinParams: boolean; isFreshIdentity: boolean; isAlreadyMember: boolean; nonceHasUnexpiredRecord: boolean; loaded: boolean }) => 'none' | 'first-visit' | 'already-member' | 'loading' | 'awaiting' | 'invited'
public_api.description: NEW. Pure state machine (app/src/lib/inviteBannerState.ts) deciding the landing/banner state. Drives both groups.tsx's first-visit branch and InviteAwaitingBanner's own render decision so there is a single source of truth for the priority order (AC-LAND-1/2/4, AC-BANNER-1/2/4).

public_api.name: computeGroupsPathAfterJoinSend
public_api.description: NEW. Pure URL-cleanup helper (app/src/lib/inviteBannerState.ts). Strips join/admin/name from router.asPath, trailing-slash aware, preserving any other query params (AC-LAND-3).

public_api.name: InviteAwaitingBanner
public_api.signature: (props: { nonce: string; adminNpub: string; groupName: string }) => JSX.Element | null
public_api.description: NEW default export, app/src/components/groups/InviteAwaitingBanner.tsx. Self-contained (like JoinRequestCard) — reads identity/marmot/profile/outbound-store via hooks internally; renders Invited/Awaiting/already-member/nothing per resolveInviteBannerState. Inline send reuses sendJoinRequest (joinRequestSender.ts) directly and gates the visible name field with JoinRequestCard's exported isWelcomeJoinRequestDisabled predicate (AC-BANNER-3) — no re-implementation.

public_api.name: GroupsPage
public_api.description: Pre-existing default export (app/pages/groups.tsx). Its returning-user query-param branch now additionally requires isFreshIdentity (destructured from useNostrIdentity()) to return the full-screen <JoinRequestCard>; otherwise falls through to the list view, which now also mounts <InviteAwaitingBanner> above PendingInvitations when join/admin/name are present.

public_api.name: shouldOpenManageLinksOverlay / nextManageLinksGuard / shouldRedirectToGroupsList / computeStillMember / performGroupMemberRemoval / classifyRemovalResult
public_api.description: Pre-existing exports from prior epics — untouched by this story.

private_files: app/pages/groups.tsx (page — GroupDetailView and the manageLinks/removal helpers are unaffected)
owned_data: route-branch logic only (no persisted data owned by this module, per architecture.md's module map)
dependencies_allowed: app/src/lib/i18n.ts — via useCopy() exclusively (GroupsInviteAwaitingCopy seam, S1)

app/src/components/groups/JoinRequestCard.tsx — <JoinRequestCard> component reuse (first-visit branch) and the exported isWelcomeJoinRequestDisabled predicate (S-SEND seam) — read-only import, no edits made to that file
app/src/context/NostrIdentityContext.tsx, MarmotContext.tsx, ProfileContext.tsx, LanguageContext.tsx — existing context hooks, unchanged
dependencies_forbidden: No direct idb-keyval import from groups.tsx or InviteAwaitingBanner.tsx — the outbound store's reactive surface is the only sanctioned path
